<html>
<head><title>Test Page</title></head>
<body>
<h1>Main Heading</h1>
<p>This is a paragraph with <b>bold</b> and <i>italic</i> text.</p>
<p>Another paragraph with <a href="#">a link</a> inside.</p>

<script>alert('This should be removed');</script>
<style>body { color: red; }</style>

<h2>Subheading</h2>
<p>Final paragraph after script and style tags.</p>

<table>
  <tr><td>Cell 1</td><td>Cell 2</td></tr>
  <tr><td>Cell 3</td><td>Cell 4</td></tr>
</table>

<div style="color: red;" data-test="value" id="mydiv">This div has inline styles and attributes.</div>

<span class="highlight" data-id="123">This span has classes and data attributes</span> <span>with extra text.</span>

<ul>
  <li>First list item</li>
  <li>Second list item</li>
</ul>

<ol>
  <li>Ordered item one</li>
  <li>Ordered item two</li>
</ol>

<h3>Header 3</h3>
<h4>Header 4</h4>
<h5>Header 5</h5>
<h6>Header 6</h6>

<img src="image.jpg" alt="This is an image description">
<img src="noalt.jpg">

<br/>
<hr/>

<form>
  <input type="text" value="default value">
  <button>Submit</button>
</form>

<header>This is a header</header>
<footer>This is a footer</footer>
</body>
</html>
